provenance.intervalSemantics: balanceOf(startBlock) plus Transfer replay over (startBlock,endBlock] integrated over [startBlock,endBlock)

candidateDiscovery.method: one evenly-spaced finalized block sampled per day-equivalent interval; both Transfer endpoints

historyCollection.method: complete indexed from/to Transfer queries for selected cohort across full interval

scoreModel.USDC: mock USD8, launch rate ~= 1.0 score per whole token per 7200 blocks
scoreModel.USDT: mock sUSD8, launch rate ~= 0.1 score per whole token per 7200 blocks
scoreModel.period: only this three-month proxy interval; not pre-period lifetime history
scoreModel.spentScore: synthetic zero because USDC/USDT have no USD8 Registry spend ledger
